stemHtml: Every 10 kt decrease in groundspeed on a 3° ILS glide path will require...

options.a: an increase in the aircraft’s rate of descent of approximately 100 ft/min.
options.b: a decrease in the aircraft’s rate of descent of approximately 100 ft/min.
options.c: an increase in the aircraft’s rate of descent of approximately 50 ft/min.
options.d: a decrease in the aircraft’s rate of descent of approximately 50 ft/min.
